text:
T2B T2B_TIME_WALK (T2B) Time Walked CHAR 1 Multistate supplement: walking when most self sufficient - time walked without sitting down. 0 = 1-2 minutes, 1 = 3-4 minutes, 2 = 5"-"0 minutes, 3 = 11"-"5 minutes, 4 = 16-30 minutes, 5 = 31+ minutes.
546 T2C T2C_SELF_WALK (T2C) Self Performance in Walking CHAR 1 Multistate supplement: walking when most self sufficient - self-performance in walking. 0 = Independent - No help or oversight, 1 = Supervision - Oversight, encouragement or cueing provided,
